top_signals.title: ECB Rate-Hike Forecasts Pared Back as Oil Regains Pre-War Level
top_signals.summary: A sharp drop in oil prices amid progress in Middle-East peace talks has prompted some economists to scale back expectations for European Central Bank interest-rate increases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Foreign Secretary announces nearly £290 million to strengthen Ukraine's recovery and energy security
top_signals.summary: Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper announces a new support package at the Ukraine Recovery Conference in Gdańsk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto relief rally fails to shake persistent bearish derivatives signal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Russia’s wheat area may fall to lowest level since 2014
top_signals.summary: Russia’s wheat planted area could decline to 25.8 million hectares in 2026, down from 26.9 million hectares a year earlier, according to estimates from agricultural consultancy SovEcon. If confirmed, this would mark the smallest wheat area since 2014, when farmers planted 25.2 million hectares. Against the backdrop of lower acreage, SovEcon has reduced its 2026/27 ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SBI Holdings agrees to acquire Japanese crypto exchange Bitbank in $288.6 million deal
top_signals.summary: SBI Holdings agreed to acquire Bitbank for $288.6 million, with the transaction expected to close around October 2026.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
